aids.mnemonic: sub（下面）+ stitute（站）→ 站在下面顶替别人 → 替代品

synonyms.note: 更常用，指替换的人或物，雅思阅读中常替换 substitute
指可供选择的其他方案，语气更宽泛

confusables.note: 注意与 'substitute A for B'（用A代替B）的用法区别

aids.derivation: vit（生命）+ al（的）→ 关乎生命的 → 至关重要的

words.def: 维生素（维持生命的物质）

aids.mnemonic: vit（生命）→ 生命攸关的 → 至关重要的

synonyms.note: 雅思阅读中常替换 vital，表示决定性的
表示必不可少的，更常见

aids.derivation: sub（下面）+ tle（网）→ 网下面的 → 不易察觉的 → 微妙的

words.def: 微妙之处（-ty 名词后缀）

aids.mnemonic: sub（下面）+ tle（网）→ 藏在网下面 → 微妙的

synonyms.note: 强调精细、需要小心处理，雅思阅读中可替换 subtle
表示细微的差别，如 fine distinction

confusables.note: 不要与 'subtitle'（字幕）混淆

expressions.usage: 写作中可用：There is no substitute for hard work.（没有什么能替代努力。）
常用搭配：The job comes with many benefits.（这份工作附带很多福利。）

questions.title: Questions 27-30 · Multiple choice
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
Write the correct letter in boxes 27-30 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: What does the reader learn about the conversation in the first paragraph?
options: A  The speakers are communicating in different languages.
B  Neither of the speakers is familiar with their environment.
C  The topic of the conversation is difficult for both speakers.
D  Aspects of the conversation are challenging for both speakers.

pairs.p: I'm struggling to follow him in English
pairs.note: 题干问对话，原文描述‘我努力跟上他’即指对话过程。

pairs.p: I'm struggling to follow him in English, on a scratchy line
pairs.note: 题干指定第一段，原文第一句即定位点。

pairs.p: distance is still an obstacle to communication
pairs.note: 题干隐含沟通障碍，原文直接说距离是障碍。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误选其他选项如‘语言不同’，但原文明确说‘speaking the same language’。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘conversation’和‘first paragraph’，到原文第一句找描述对话的内容，发现‘struggling to follow’和‘distance obstacle’对应沟通困难。

items.prompt: What assists the electronic translator during lectures at Karlsruhe Institute of Technology?
options: A  the repeated content of lectures
B  the students' reading skills
C  the languages used
D  the lecturers' technical ability

pairs.note: assists和helps是同义词替换，都表示‘帮助’。

pairs.q: during lectures at Karlsruhe Institute of Technology
pairs.note: 题干问的是‘在讲座中什么帮助了电子翻译器’，原文直接提到‘讲师清晰发言’等条件，属于句式改写。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误选其他选项，但原文只提到了讲师清晰、无背景噪音、内容重复这三个条件，没有提到其他因素。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘assists the electronic translator’和‘lectures’，到原文找对应，发现‘helps’对应‘assists’，而‘lecturers speak clearly’对应讲座场景。

items.prompt: When referring to The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, the writer suggests that
options: A  the Babel fish was considered undesirable at the time.
B  this book was not seriously intending to predict the future.
C  artificial speech translation was not a surprising development.
D  some speech translation techniques are better than others.

items.prompt: What does the writer say about sharing earpieces?
options: A  It is something people will get used to doing.
B  The reluctance to do this is understandable.
C  The equipment will be unnecessary in the future.
D  It is something few people need to worry about.

pairs.note: 题干中的'sharing earpieces'在原文中被代词'That'指代，需要结合上文理解。
题干问作者对共享耳机的看法，原文用'这一点并非完全出人意料'来表达观点。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的'sharing earpieces'在原文中没有直接出现，而是用'That'指代前文提到的共享耳机行为。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'sharing earpieces'，到原文找其指代，再找作者对其的评价（can't have been totally unexpected）。

questions.title: Questions 31-34 · Matching sentence endings
instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct ending, A-F, below.
Write the correct letter, A-F, in boxes 31-34 on your answer sheet.
A  but there are concerns about this.
B  as systems do not need to conform to standard practices.
C  but they are far from perfect.
F  and have an awareness of good manners.

items.prompt: Speech translation methods are developing fast in Japan
options: A  but there are concerns about this.
B  as systems do not need to conform to standard practices.
C  but they are far from perfect.
D  despite the noise issues.
E  because translation is immediate.
F  and have an awareness of good manners.

pairs.note: 题干说‘发展快’，原文说‘还有很长的路要走’，意思相反，属于反向表达。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的‘Japan’在原文中未出现，可能干扰学生认为定位句与日本无关，但实际是通过否定关系匹配。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干‘developing fast’（发展快），到原文找否定或相反表达‘a long way to go’（路还长），从而定位。

items.prompt: TV interviews that use translation voiceover methods are successful
options: A  but there are concerns about this.
B  as systems do not need to conform to standard practices.
C  but they are far from perfect.
D  despite the noise issues.
E  because translation is immediate.
F  and have an awareness of good manners.

pairs.q: TV interviews that use translation voiceover methods
pairs.p: translator's voice speaking over the foreign politician being interviewed on the TV
pairs.note: 题干说‘使用翻译配音方法的电视采访’，原文描述为‘译员的声音盖过电视上正接受采访的外国政要’，是对同一场景的不同表述。
题干说‘成功的’，原文说‘同步的’，成功意味着同步进行，没有中断。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的‘successful’对应原文的‘simultaneous’，而不是其他词。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘TV interviews’和‘translation voiceover’，到原文找‘translator's voice speaking over...being interviewed on the TV’，再找‘successful’对应的‘simultaneous’，即可定位。

items.prompt: Future translation systems should address people appropriately
options: A  but there are concerns about this.
B  as systems do not need to conform to standard practices.
C  but they are far from perfect.
D  despite the noise issues.
E  because translation is immediate.
F  and have an awareness of good manners.

pairs.note: 题干中的'Future translation systems'在原文中简化为'Systems'，指代相同对象。

pairs.p: addressing people in the right way
pairs.note: 题干中的'should address people appropriately'与原文的'addressing people in the right way'意思一致，都是指以恰当的方式称呼他人。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'address people appropriately'，到原文找同义表达'addressing people in the right way'，同时注意'Future translation systems'对应原文的'Systems'。

items.prompt: Users may be able to maintain their local customs
options: A  but there are concerns about this.
B  as systems do not need to conform to standard practices.
C  but they are far from perfect.
D  despite the noise issues.
E  because translation is immediate.
F  and have an awareness of good manners.

pairs.note: maintain 和 preserve 是同义词，都表示‘保持、保护’
may be able to 和 might help to 都表示可能性，但 might help to 更强调‘有助于’

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的‘maintain’可能被误认为与原文中的‘slowing the spread’相关，但实际替换是‘preserve’
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘maintain local customs’，到原文找同义表达‘preserve local customs’，即可定位

questions.title: Questions 35-40 · YES / NO / NOT GIVEN
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the views of the writer in Reading Passage 3?
In boxes 35-40 on your answer sheet, write
YES if the statement agrees with the views of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the views of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

items.prompt: Language translation systems will be seen as very useful throughout the academic and professional worlds.

pairs.note: 题干说‘非常有用’，原文说‘吸引眼球的新奇玩意儿’，意思相反，所以是NO。

pairs.q: throughout the academic and professional worlds
pairs.note: 题干说‘在学术和专业领域’，原文说‘打造语言无障碍社会’，范围不同，但关键是否定态度。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的‘very useful’与原文的‘eye-catching novelties’形成强烈对比，容易误判为NOT GIVEN，但实际是明确否定。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘very useful’，到原文找对应，发现原文说它们是‘eye-catching novelties’（新奇玩意儿），而不是有用的步骤，因此判断为NO。

items.prompt: The overall value of automated translation to family life is yet to be shown.

pairs.p: help people conduct their family lives or relationships
pairs.note: 题干说‘整体价值’，原文说‘帮助经营家庭生活或人际关系’，是具体化描述。
‘尚未证明’对应‘尚无定论’，都是不确定的意思。
原文‘it’指代前文的‘automated translation’，是原词复现。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误选NOT GIVEN，因为原文说‘尚无定论’，但题干‘yet to be shown’与‘open to question’同义，且原文提到一个积极可能性，所以整体价值并非完全未知，而是有讨论空间，故答案为YES。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干‘overall value’和‘yet to be shown’，到原文找对应表达‘help...family lives’和‘open to question’，确认同义替换后选YES。

items.prompt: Automated translation could make life more difficult for immigrant families.

pairs.note: 题干说'使生活更困难'，原文说'克服语言障碍'，意思相反。
immigrant families对应移民后的家庭。
题干是负面预测，原文是正面可能性，方向相反。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'could'与原文的'could'相同，容易误判为同意，但实际内容相反。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'make life more difficult'和'immigrant families'，到原文找到'overcome the language barriers'和'after migration'，发现原文说克服困难而非制造困难，因此答案为NO。

items.prompt: Visual aspects of language translation are being considered by scientists.

pairs.note: 题干说语言翻译的视觉方面，原文提到嘴唇动作，属于视觉方面，但未明确说科学家正在考虑。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'being considered'（正在考虑）在原文中没有对应信息，原文只描述了现象，未提及科学家的考虑。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'visual aspects'和'language translation'，到原文找视觉相关描述，发现'lip movements'属于视觉，但原文没有提到科学家在考虑这些方面，因此选NOT GIVEN。

items.prompt: International scientists have found English easier to translate into other languages than Latin.

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全相同的词组，直接定位

pairs.q: English easier to translate into other languages than Latin
pairs.p: use English as a lingua franca, where their predecessors used Latin
pairs.note: 题干说英语比拉丁语更容易翻译，原文说英语作为通用语而前辈用拉丁语，但未比较翻译难度，属于句式改写但信息不对应

paraphrase.trap: 题干比较翻译难度，原文只提到使用情况，未涉及翻译难易，易误判为NO
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'International scientists'和'English easier to translate than Latin'，到原文找到'International scientists'和'use English as a lingua franca...used Latin'，但原文没有比较翻译难度，所以是NOT GIVEN

items.prompt: As far as language is concerned, there is a difference between people's social and practical needs.

pairs.note: 题干中的'practical needs'对应原文的'practical need'，都是指实际需求。
题干中的'social needs'对应原文的'social value'，都涉及社会层面的需求或价值。
题干说'有差异'，原文用'diminish'（减弱）和'persist'（长存）的对比体现差异，这里取'diminish'作为差异的一方。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'As far as language is concerned'是范围限定，但原文直接讨论语言，不构成干扰。注意题干说'is a difference'，原文用'will diminish'和'will persist'对比，表达一致。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'practical needs'和'social needs'，到原文找对应词'practical need'和'social value'，发现原文通过'diminish'和'persist'的对比表达了差异，因此答案为YES。

phrases.def: 巴别鱼（科幻小说中放入耳中即可听懂任何语言的生物）
以名字相称的关系（表亲近随意）
以名字互称；关系随意亲近
